title: Gonialoe sladeniana
taxonomy: Gonialoe sladeniana is a species of succulent plant. It belongs to the family Asphodelaceae. Gonialoe sladeniana further categorizes into the subfamily Asphodeloideae and the genus Gonialoe. This succulent plant is native to South Africa. Within the taxonomic classification, Gonialoe sladeniana is placed in the kingdom Plantae.
